scripts.tofu_dev_another: cd tofu/environment/dev-another && tofu init && tofu apply -auto-approve
scripts.tofu_dev: cd tofu/environment/dev && tofu init && tofu apply -auto-approve
scripts.terraform_dev: cd tofu/environment/dev && terraform init && terraform apply -auto-approve
scripts.azure_list_blobs: az storage blob list --account-name mikesstoragedemopurpose --container-name tfstate-datafactory-demo --auth-mode login
scripts.azure_list_blobs_env_auth: az storage blob list --account-name mikesstoragedemopurpose --container-name tfstate-datafactory-demo
